human_actions_pending.action: After Phase 22.4.2.2 ships: edit existing 3 weather jobs in ~/.ironhermes/cron/jobs.json to deliver=telegram:7018949547 — they pre-date this phase and were created with deliver=local. Plans 01/02 fix the DEFAULT for new jobs only — existing jobs are NOT auto-migrated.
human_actions_pending.context: User confirmed during 22.4.2.1 UAT: dispatch fix works but live cron output isn't reaching TG because all 3 jobs have deliver=local. CONTEXT.md D-12 explicitly calls this out.

decisions.decision: Split into 2 plans (Plan 01 CLI, Plan 02 LLM tool) instead of folding into one
decisions.rationale: Plan 02 depends on Plan 01's helper enum + method; splitting keeps each plan independently reviewable and lets Plan 01 ship even if Plan 02 reveals an edge case

decisions.decision: OriginDecision enum lives in ironhermes-core::config with String chat_id (NOT JobOrigin)
decisions.rationale: Researcher Q-OQ1 confirmed ironhermes-core has zero dep on ironhermes-cron — embedding JobOrigin would create circular dep. CLI/tool consumers construct JobOrigin from the enum's String fields.

decisions.decision: Plan 02 reuses Plan 01's Config::telegram_default_origin() helper (NOT runtime Origin plumbing through CronjobTool::new)
decisions.rationale: Pragmatic — zero plumbing surgery, consistent behavior with CLI path. Per-message Origin precision lost for multi-chat whitelists, but user's setup is single-chat so not a concern today.

decisions.decision: Plan 02 uses tracing::warn! NOT eprintln! for multi-chat hint
decisions.rationale: Stderr from inside an LLM tool would pollute the JSON response the LLM reads back
Researcher Q5 confirmed cmd_edit already has Option<String> for deliver — current edit ergonomics already correct, no surgery needed

decisions.decision: INV ledger ends at 64 INVs (62 from Phase 22.4.2.1 + 1 from Plan 01 + 1 from Plan 02)
decisions.rationale: Each plan owns its own INV per Phase 22.4.2.1 D-13 pattern

next_action: Spawn gsd-plan-checker on the two PLAN.md files. Verification context: phase 22.4.2.2, two plans (01 wave 1 / 02 wave 2 depends_on 01), decision coverage D-01..D-12 distributed across decisions_addressed: blocks in frontmatter, anti-shallow rules, cross-plan consistency (OriginDecision in core::config with String chat_id, not JobOrigin), goal-backward (CLI + LLM tool both default to TG origin when single-chat whitelist), INV final count 64. After plan-checker passes: run decision-coverage SDK gate, record planning, commit plans + STATE + ROADMAP, then execute Plan 01 (gsd-executor sequential, no worktree — invariants_22_4.rs and other crates may overlap), then Plan 02, then verify.
context_notes: Mid-flight in /gsd-plan-phase 22.4.2.2 --chain. Phase 22.4.2.1 (predecessor) FULLY SHIPPED this session — 10 atomic commits f796674..e7d5450, 62 INVs green, all 3 regressions resolved (cron slash UI, TG delivery dispatch, Ctrl+C graceful shutdown). User confirmed Ctrl+C works live; user spotted that weather jobs aren't reaching TG due to deliver=local default — that's the regression Phase 22.4.2.2 fixes. The 'dispatch_gateway in scope' user constraint added Plan 02 (LLM tool path) on top of original Plan 01 (CLI path). Both plans share Plan 01's OriginDecision helper to keep behavior consistent.
